chunks.title: Jehoiakim's Rebellion and Death
chunks.reason: Narrative covering Jehoiakim's service to Babylon, his rebellion, the divine judgment through marauding bands, and his death.

chunks.title: The Fall of Jerusalem and Exile
chunks.reason: Detailed account of Jehoiachin's short reign, the siege by Nebuchadnezzar, the capture of the city, and the deportation of the people.

chunks.title: Zedekiah's Reign and Rebellion
chunks.reason: Introduction of Zedekiah as the new king, his evil reign, and the final note on God's anger leading to his rebellion against Babylon.
